THE_ARCHITECT.talk.MORGANBERSERKER-MORGA: A tyrant queen from a Britain that no longer exists. Your crown carries no weight here, fairy.
Climb, then. A kingdom of two thousand years was raised one floor at a time - and yours fell faster.
That lance of yours... a pillar that holds up the world, whittled into a weapon. Such waste befits a tyrant.
Curse me all you wish. The Spire has outlasted colder winters than yours.
